title: Test, improve and maintain healthy soil in a permaculture system
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Test, improve and maintain healthy soil in a permaculture system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Sample soil in a permaculture system

pcs.text: Determine site and purpose for soil tests in a permaculture system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine site and purpose for soil tests in a permaculture system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine site and purpose for soil tests in a permaculture system.
